title: Bonspiels and Events
content:
# Bonspiels and Events

### 2025-26 Events... Save the Dates!

* **[Elisabeth Childs Challenge](/index.php/86-bonspiels/537-gncc-childs-2026)** (GNCC Women's 5U) - February 26-March 1, 2026
* **[Triangle Club Bonspiel](/index.php/events/bonspiels/86-bonspiels/452-triangle-club-championship)** \- March 12-15, 2026 - Registration open now - members only
* [**Carolina Classic**](/index.php/events/carolina-classic) \- April 16-19, 2026 - Registration full, waitlist available
* [**Rock'em, Sock'em One-day Pointspiel**](/index.php/events/bonspiels/86-bonspiels/440-rock-em-sock-em-one-day-bonspiel) \- May 2, 2026

### 2025-2026 Previous Events

* **Back in the Hack Juniors Camp** \- was September 13-14, 2025
* [**Over - Under Bonspiel**](/index.php/events/over-under-spiel) \- was September 19-21, 2025
* [**Triangle Mixed Doubles**](/index.php/events/mixed-doubles-bonspiel) \- was November 7-9, 2025
* [**Tired of Turkey One Day**](/index.php/events/bonspiels/86-bonspiels/522-tired-of-turkey-pointspiel) \- was November 29, 2025
* [**New Years Day Spiel** ](/index.php/events/bonspiels/86-bonspiels/430-new-years-day-spiel)\- was January 1, 2026
* [**Triangle Junior Bonspiel**](/index.php/events/triangle-junior-bonspiel) \- was January 3 and 4, 2026
* [**Triangle Brewers' Charity Spiel**](/index.php/events/bonspiels/86-bonspiels/518-brewer-s-charity-spiel) \- was January 10, 2026

Looking for a bonspiel somewhere else? The Triangle Curling Club is a member of the Grand National Curling Club (GNCC), the United States Curling Association (USA Curling), and the United States Women's Curling Association (USWCA). Member clubs of these organizations host several bonspiels for their members throughout the season. Check out their calendars at the links below.

* **[GNCC Bonspiel Calendar](https://www.gncc.org/index.php/calendars/calendar/complete-calendar)**
* **[USA Curling Bonspiel Calendar](https://www.usacurling.org/bonspiel-calendar)**
* **[USA Curling 5U Qualifiers for 2025-26](https://www.usacurling.org/press-releases/2026fiveandunderqualifyingevents)**
* **[USWCA Bonspiel Calendar](https://www.uswca.org/participating-bonspiels)**

[Bonspiel Terms and Conditions](/index.php/events/bonspiels/2-uncategorised/489-bonspiel-terms-and-conditions)
